# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv-build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-11

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Compile device code in 64 bit mode
CUDA_64_BIT_DEVICE_CODE:BOOL=ON

//Specify 'real' GPU architectures to build binaries for, BIN(PTX)
// format is supported (see https://docs.opencv.org/4.x/d2/dbc/cuda_intro.html)
CUDA_ARCH_BIN:STRING=8.7

//Specify 'virtual' PTX architectures to build PTX intermediate
// code for (see https://docs.opencv.org/4.x/d2/dbc/cuda_intro.html)
CUDA_ARCH_PTX:STRING=

//Attach the build rule to the CUDA source file.  Enable only when
// the CUDA source file is added to at most one target.
CUDA_ATTACH_VS_BUILD_RULE_TO_CUDA_FILE:BOOL=ON

//Generate and parse .cubin files in Device mode.
CUDA_BUILD_CUBIN:BOOL=OFF

//Build in Emulation mode
CUDA_BUILD_EMULATION:BOOL=OFF

CUDA_CUDART_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so

//"cuda" library (older versions only).
CUDA_CUDA_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so

//Enable deprecated generations in the list
CUDA_ENABLE_DEPRECATED_GENERATION:BOOL=OFF

//Enable --use_fast_math for CUDA compiler 
CUDA_FAST_MATH:BOOL=OFF

//Directory to put all the output files.  If blank it will default
// to the CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR
CUDA_GENERATED_OUTPUT_DIR:PATH=

//Build CUDA device code only for specific GPU architecture. Leave
// empty to build for all architectures (see https://docs.opencv.org/4.x/d2/dbc/cuda_intro.html).
CUDA_GENERATION:STRING=

CUDA_HOST_COMPILATION_CPP:BOOL=ON

CUDA_HOST_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

// option.
CUDA_VERBOSE_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

ip.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/gemm.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/halfconvert.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/inrange.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/intel_gemm.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/lut.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/meanstddev.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/minmaxloc.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/mixchannels.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/mulspectrums.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/normalize.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/reduce.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/reduce2.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/repeat.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/set_identity.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/split_merge.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/opencl/transpose.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv-build/modules/core/opencl_kernels_core.cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv-build/modules/core/opencl_kernels_core.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/arithm.simd.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/arithm_ipp.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/bufferpool.impl.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/convert.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/convert.simd.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/convert_scale.simd.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/count_non_zero.simd.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/directx.inc.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/gl_core_3_1.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/hal_internal.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/hal_replacement.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/has_non_zero.simd.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/core/src/intel_gpu_gemm.inl.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/open .cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/templmatch.cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/thresh.cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/utils.cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/accumulate.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/bilateral.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/blend_linear.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/boxFilter.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/boxFilter3x3.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/calc_back_project.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/canny.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/clahe.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/color_hsv.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/color_lab.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/color_rgb.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/color_yuv.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/corner.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/covardata.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filter2D.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filter2DSmall.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filterSepCol.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filterSepRow.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filterSep_singlePass.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/filterSmall.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/gaussianBlur3x3.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/gaussianBlur5x5.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/gftt.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/histogram.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/hough_lines.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/integral_sum.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/img v/modules/video/src/opencl/bgfg_mog2.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/opencl/dis_flow.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/opencl/optical_flow_farneback.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/opencl/pyrlk.cl;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv-build/modules/video/opencl_kernels_video.cpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv-build/modules/video/opencl_kernels_video.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/lkpyramid.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/precomp.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/tracking/detail/tracker_feature_haar.impl.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/tracking/detail/tracker_mil_model.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/tracking/detail/tracker_mil_state.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/tracking/detail/tracking_feature.hpp;/home/wolfie/hmdcam/opencv/modules/video/src/tracking/detail/tracking_online_mil.hpp
